h13281070g6643g47b1gb7aag76b66dc80fc5: *Decorated with a grinning face, this cold, iron flask is sealed with a brass stopper.*
h5367c66bg241dg4695gad6fgd78e72428d83: *Disguised among the decorative elements, you notice a familiar arcane engraving.*
hff11a3b1ga983g4feeg946dg3d5de42c34c9: *This is a powerful magical item, capable of trapping and holding a creature.*
h835d78bcge35cg409dg9456gb589bdbc219c: *The sealed stopper suggests it is inhabited.*
h09a68db4g0ea6g43cag9992g11f07fb816c8: *Although elaborately designed, it appears to be nothing more than a mundane drinking vessel.*
ha1d06e60ga021g4e20ga4e9gc7f77459cacc: *The flask shudders in your hand, then magical energy emanates from its neck as a creature emerges.*
h064d7a08gd344g4735g9b2cgfbd92f815cc6: *The flask is cold and heavy in your hand.*
h618d7689g8b8cg4fdagade2g498b2fb74c48: *Though empty, the flask is unnaturally heavy in your hand.*
h86f01e62g1a6bg40bdg8ad6gcc0e141dcadc: *The flask is cold and heavy in your hand. There is a creature trapped within.*
